subject: [PATCH v2 03/18] btrfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the Btrfs direct-io code to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a helper function that finishes previous mappings and produces the next one. This change does not introduce any functional changes but rather adapts the existing code to the updated iomap API. The conversion involves updating the btrfs_dio_iomap_ops structure to point to the new ->iomap_next() callback.
